0.l2: World: news about international politics, diplomacy, conflicts, global affairs, and cross-country developments.
l3: World: news about international relations, diplomacy, and global political events.
World: coverage of conflicts, international organizations, and cross-border issues.
World: reporting on foreign affairs, global crises, and worldwide developments.

1.l2: Sports: news about athletes, teams, matches, tournaments, competitions, and sporting events.
l3: Sports: news about teams, athletes, matches, and competitive events.
Sports: coverage of tournaments, leagues, game results, and player performance.
Sports: reporting on athletic competitions, sporting events, and related outcomes.

2.l2: Business: news about companies, markets, finance, investments, trade, and economic activity.
l3: Business: news about companies, corporate activity, and financial markets.
Business: coverage of trade, investments, economic trends, and market developments.
Business: reporting on finance, industry, commerce, and business performance.

3.l2: Science and Technology: news about scientific research, inventions, computing, technology, and innovation.
l3: Science and Technology: news about research, technological innovation, and scientific progress.
Science and Technology: coverage of computing, engineering, discoveries, and new technologies.
Science and Technology: reporting on science, digital systems, inventions, and technical developments.
